title: Files: compress-to-disk + extract — backend endpoints + UI

verification.vitest: 90/90 (82 baseline + 8 new — AR-1..AR-8 archive integration tests)
verification.build: pass (main bundle gzip 104.67 → 104.87 kB; files chunk 21.66 → 27.12 kB)
verification.apiSmoke: verified 2026-05-17: POST /files/compress 204 + on-disk tar.gz; POST /files/extract 204 + md5-equal round-trip; bad extension (.rar) → 400 FILE_UNSUPPORTED_ARCHIVE
verification.uiSmoke: deferred — covered by API integration + Vitest. To visually confirm: select files in /files, click Compress, choose tar.gz, save; then click the PackageOpen icon on the new archive, set dest, save.

originated: v0.1.1 tech-debt list (carried over from MVP)

in: New backend endpoints POST /files/compress and POST /files/extract
Compress dialog in toolbar + Extract action on archive rows

decisions: Backend was misrepresented as existing — new endpoints required (decisions.md §1).
Explicit zip-slip guard before any write (§3).
Multi-select via checkbox column, no shift-click (§4).
Compress = toolbar; Extract = row action menu (§5).
Backend unit tests + manual smoke; no new e2e (§6).
204 No Content on success, consistent with other write endpoints (§7).
